json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Greek 16 may be substituted for Greek 1, 2, 3.

json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete eight upper-division Greek and Latin courses, of which at least four must be in each language, including Greek 110 or Latin 110.

options.title: Upper-Division Greek and Latin Courses
options.description: Greek and/or Latin 197 and 199 may be applied only be petition.

options.title: Upper-Division Classical Civilization and/or Ancient History Courses
